_comment: Two JSON-LD blocks. Add the matching one to each comparison page (replace the bare WebPage block, or add alongside it). Resolves F4. Both blocks use SoftwareApplication for CostSage and the competitor, plus an ItemList of comparison points. Do NOT add Review markup unless a verified third-party review exists — schema spam tanks rankings.

@graph.name: nOps Alternative: CostSage Executes Savings Automatically
@graph.description: CostSage is Agentic AI for FinOps — it reasons, plans, and executes savings autonomously, while nOps stops at recommendations.

itemListElement.name: Execution: nOps surfaces recommendations; CostSage executes them after approval.
Pricing: nOps charges a percentage of savings; CostSage uses outcome-based flat pricing.
Cloud coverage: nOps is AWS-first with limited Azure; CostSage ships AWS + Azure parity.

mainEntity.name: Why switch from nOps to CostSage?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teams switch when they want execution, not just visibility. nOps tells you where waste is; CostSage executes the fix once you approve. Pricing is also flat instead of percentage-of-savings, so the savings stay yours.
Around 60 seconds to connect your AWS account via a read-only IAM role. Recommendations begin populating within minutes. nOps account can run in parallel during evaluation; no migration is required.

@graph.name: CloudZero Alternative: Automated FinOps Execution | CostSage
@graph.description: CloudZero excels at unit cost allocation. CostSage is Agentic AI for FinOps — it reasons, plans, and executes savings autonomously.

itemListElement.name: Strength: CloudZero excels at unit cost allocation and per-customer cost intelligence.
Gap: CloudZero recommends; CostSage executes the recommended actions.
Pricing: CloudZero is enterprise-priced; CostSage offers self-serve outcome-based pricing.

mainEntity.name: Can I run CloudZero and CostSage together?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. CloudZero gives you unit-economics granularity; CostSage gives you autonomous remediation. Many teams keep CloudZero for finance reporting and add CostSage to close the loop on identified waste.

Not for unit-economics analysis at scale. CostSage focuses on rightsizing, RI/Savings Plan optimisation, idle-resource cleanup and tag enforcement — and executes them. If your primary need is per-product cost allocation, keep CloudZero. If your primary need is to actually reduce the bill, CostSage is the answer.
